title: HypurrCo AMA: Latest developments with Hyperbeat & Dexari
summary_title: Mobile-first perps and yield capture reshape Hyperliquid's UX
summary_description: Dexari brings full-featured desktop trading to mobile; Hyperbeat tokenizes funding rates into LSTs and yield products.

key_moments.label: Dexari: self-custody wallet with CEX-grade UX, powered by Hyperliquid
Hyperbeat: yield layer capturing funding rates, launching b-HYPE LST
Dexari founders ex-Binance US, building decentralized alternative to CEX mobile apps
Hyperbeat positions as 'Binance Earn' for Hyperliquid with on/off-ramp via HyperBeat Pay
Both teams prioritize organic growth and user feedback over paid marketing
b-HYPE integrates across vaults, collateral, and HIP3 market deployment
Dexari hit ~1B trading volume in first month; planning HyperEVM feature embedding
USDC launch on HyperEVM and HYPE-USDT on spot market unlock cross-chain liquidity
